title: Lights, Camera, Action!
description: A simple mod created for ModFest 26: Animation, Affection, Academia! which brings masks to minecraft
body:
Lights, Camera, Action! is a mod that brings the life of the theatre into minecraft through adding masks to the game.
# Features
The Mod currently adds 11 different types of masks to minecraft all giving there own unique benefits to the player wearing them.
This includes:
<details>
<summary>All Current Masks</summary>
Paper Mask - The First mask the player crafts with no apparent benefit

Bone Mask - No Benefit at this current time

SpiritKeeper Mask (Based of the Allay) - Negates 75% of all recieved fall damage

Blazekin Mask - Negates 50% of all burning time

Armadillo Mask - Allows the player to negate 45% of all knockback

Bunny Mask - The player Runs 20% faster and is able to jump with an 80% higher jump power

Ender Dragon Mask - 10% additional attack damage

Fox Fighter Mask - The player can attack 7.5% faster than there opponent

Fox Samurai Mask - This mask makes the Player disappear from the player locator bar

Explosive Hero Mask - The player takes 50% less knockback inflicted from explosions

Hadrian Fencer's Mask - Currently same benefit as explosive hero but subject to change in future

</details>

# Recipes

The Recipe for the Paper Mask within the Mod

![Paper Mask Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcd9633aef6f0ae6de7d2dd7f82c30afed9b081f.png)

## Frequently Asked Questions
Can this mod be used within Modpacks?

Answer: Yes, feel free to use this mod within modpacks

Can I port this mod to Forge or a different Version?

Answer: Please, Contact me directly on discord for this, my user is "its.vixen_"
